features: 【8 Large with Different Soft and Mild Scents】Elaborate natural bathtub ball is infused with 8 natural and organic fragrances, such as"Rose" "Orange"; "Lemon"; "Lavender"; "Jasmine"; "Ocean"; "Mint"; "Blueberry". Giving you an entirely new bathing experience.

【100% Organic Natural Handmade】Our Bath ball are handmade form natural and organic ingredients, such as sea salt,Fragrance oil, Shea Butter, Coconut oil, Essential oil, Food Colorants, Some Topped with Flower Petals and Edible Candy. All bath ball are safe for children.

【Rich Bubbles & Vibrant Colors】When you put the ball in the water, they will start to fizz and release colorful bubbles and skin beneficial ingredients. It becomes fun to bathe in the colorful and fragrant floral bathtub.Each bath ball allows you to enjoy the soothing and spa-level luxury experience brought by the natural organic colorful fragrance bath.

【Good for Your Skin】Bath ball are all handmade of natural, It will not cause any skin injury.It is suitable for normal and dry skin, It can be used continuously to improve skin texture,deep cleansing the skin, moisturizing and exfoliating.No matter what your skin type, the beneficial ingredients in bath ball leave it soft, supple, and silky. Take pleasure in a romantic aromatic bath, that will help release stress from your day.

【Wonderful Present Set】All 8 bath ball are individually packaged to keep fresh and ensure their unique scents; it is suitable for people of all ages on Christmas, Valentine's Day, birthday, anniversary, Children's Day and Mother's Day or other holidays.
description: Product Description Lanwexy 8 uniquely designed Large Bath ball Gift Set Enjoying SPA Aromatherapy at Home Experience bathing culture at the highest level with the Lanwexy Bath ball. Handmade, added essential oil, composed of only the finest ingredients. Help Release Stress Take a good bath with Bath balls against a tired day. Take stress away, calm your mind and make you feel relax. Makes Bath Time Fun Give you an interesting and comfortable bath experience. Safe, Repair and Replenishe Your Skin Cleansing and moisturizing the skin. Handmade and unique All our bath balls are carefully handmade. No residue and easy to rinse. Luxurious Gift for Anyone The perfect present for any occasion. Cruelty free and humane Important: We do not test our products on animals, we love animals.
